props.ChoiceText: Your horse chose the worst possible moment to express an opinion about ceremony, and you hit the ground before your reputation did.
props.ChoiceBio: Horse before dignity taught you that mounted honor is only partly your own accomplishment.

0.TransitionText: Because horse before dignity taught you that mounted honor is only partly your own accomplishment, the matter only confirmed your place among the knightly.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because horse before dignity taught you that mounted honor is only partly your own accomplishment, you were carried into the speed, rank, and danger of the cavalry.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because horse before dignity taught you that mounted honor is only partly your own accomplishment, command ceased to be an accident of rank and became the center of your life.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
